page_metadata.biotools__summary: A reference map data repository for human protein complexes, containing > 4,600 total complexes, > 7,700 proteins, and > 56,000 unique interactions, including thousands of confident protein interactions not identified by the original publications.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A reference map data repository for human protein complexes, containing > 4,600 total complexes, > 7,700 proteins, and > 56,000 unique interactions, including thousands of confident protein interactions not identified by the original publications.
